name: GridCsvExportApi
description: The CSV export API interface that is available in the grid [[apiRef]].

properties.name: exportDataAsCsv
properties.description: Downloads and exports a CSV of the grid's data.
properties.type: (options?: undefined | { delimiter?: string | undefined, fileName?: string | undefined, utf8WithBom?: false | true | undefined, includeHeaders?: false | true | undefined, includeColumnGroupsHeaders?: false | true | undefined, getRowsToExport?: (params: GridCsvGetRowsToExportParams<GridApiCommunity>) => GridRowId[] | undefined, shouldAppendQuotes?: false | true | undefined, escapeFormulas?: false | true | undefined, fields?: string[] | undefined, allColumns?: false | true | undefined }) => void

properties.name: getDataAsCsv
properties.description:
Returns the grid data as a CSV string.
This method is used internally by `exportDataAsCsv`.
properties.type: (options?: undefined | { delimiter?: string | undefined, fileName?: string | undefined, utf8WithBom?: false | true | undefined, includeHeaders?: false | true | undefined, includeColumnGroupsHeaders?: false | true | undefined, getRowsToExport?: (params: GridCsvGetRowsToExportParams<GridApiCommunity>) => GridRowId[] | undefined, shouldAppendQuotes?: false | true | undefined, escapeFormulas?: false | true | undefined, fields?: string[] | undefined, allColumns?: false | true | undefined }) => string
